ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the episode belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "enum" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "stardate" REAL /* Stardate of the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the episode */,
  "storyby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the story by writer */,
  "teleplayby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teleplay by writer */,
  "airdate" TEXT /* Airdate of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the episode */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the series started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the series ended */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storyby" (
  "storyby_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each story by writer */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "story_credit" TEXT /* Story credit for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storyby_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storyby_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storyby_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teleplayby" (
  "teleplayby_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teleplay by writer */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "teleplay_credit" TEXT /* Teleplay credit for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teleplayby_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teleplayby_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teleplayby_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_rating" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user rating the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_rating_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_rating_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user commenting on the episode */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given by the user */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was given */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the episode */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the episode was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_view_count" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view count */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the episode has received */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the view count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_view_count_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_category_map" (
  "episode_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode category */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES episode_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_category_map_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
